name: HMS Vagabond (P 18)
events: The history of HMS Vagabond as compiled on this page is extracted from the logbooks of this submarine.
This page was last updated in April 2019.
5 Feb 1945 Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) shifted from the Tyne to Blyth. (1)
6 Feb 1945 Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) conducted trials off Blyth. (1)
7 Feb 1945 Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) conducted trials off Blyth. (1)
13 Feb 1945 Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) departed Blyth for Scapa Flow. (1)
14 Feb 1945 Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) arrived at Scapa Flow. (1)
17 Feb 1945 HMS Tapir (Lt. J.C.Y. Roxbourgh, DSO, DSC, RN) and Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) conducted attack exercises off Scapa Flow during which they served as targets for each other. (2)
20 Feb 1945 HMS Tapir (Lt. J.C.Y. Roxbourgh, DSO, DSC, RN) and Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) conducted attack exercises off Scapa Flow during which they served as targets for each other. (2)

21 Feb 1945 HMS Tapir (Lt. J.C.Y. Roxbourgh, DSO, DSC, RN), HMS Venturer (Lt. J.S. Launders, DSO, DSC and Bar, RN) and Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) departed Scapa Flow for Holy Loch via Loch Cairnbawn. They were escorted by HMS Shikari (Lt. E.H.U. Cautley, RNVR). (2)
23 Feb 1945 Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) arrived at Holy Loch. (1)
26 Feb 1945 Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) conducted log trials and D/F calibration trials in the Clyde area. (1)
27 Feb 1945 Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) conducted acceptance trials in the Clyde area following which she was commissioned at Holy Loch. (1)
28 Feb 1945 HMS Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) conducted exercises in the Clyde area. (1)
1 Mar 1945 HMS Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) conducted exercises in the Clyde area. (3)
2 Mar 1945 HMS Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) conducted exercises in the Clyde area. (3)
3 Mar 1945 HMS Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) shifted from Holy Loch to Arrochar. (3)
4 Mar 1945 HMS Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) conducted torpedo discharge trials off Arrochar. (3)
5 Mar 1945 HMS Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) conducted torpedo discharge trials off Arrochar. (3)
6 Mar 1945 HMS Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) conducted torpedo discharge trials off Arrochar. She proceeded to Holy Loch on completion. (3)

10 Mar 1945 HMS Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) conducted attack exercises in the Clyde area during which HMS Bridgewater (Cdr.(Retd.) R.H. Mack, RN) and HMS Sardonyx (Lt.Cdr. L.F.L. Hill, RNR) served as the targets. Upon completion HMS Vagabond proceeded to Campbeltown. (3)
11 Mar 1945 HMS Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) conducted A/S exercises off Campbeltown. (3)

12 Mar 1945 HMS Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) conducted A/S exercises off Campbeltown with HMS Hotspur (Lt.Cdr. D.R. Mallinson, RN) and HMS Ambuscade (A/Lt.Cdr. H.G. Chesterman, DSC and Bar, RNR). (3)
13 Mar 1945 HMS Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) conducted A/S exercises off Campbeltown. (3)
14 Mar 1945 HMS Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) shifted from Campbeltown to Holy Loch. (3)
16 Mar 1945 HMS Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) conducted noise tials in Loch Goil. (3)
17 Mar 1945 HMS Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) conducted exercises in the Clyde area. (3)
18 Mar 1945 HMS Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) conducted night attack exercises in the Clyde area during which HMS Bridgewater (Cdr.(Retd.) R.H. Mack, RN) served as the target. (3)
19 Mar 1945 HMS Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) departed Rothesay for Scapa Flow. She was escorted by HMS Shikari (Lt. E.A. Tyrer, DSC, RN). (3)
21 Mar 1945 HMS Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) arrived at Scapa Flow. (3)
22 Mar 1945 HMS Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) conducted exercises at/off Scapa Flow. (3)

23 Mar 1945 HMS Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) conducted A/S exercises at Scapa Flow with HMS Devonshire (Capt. G.M.B. Langley, OBE, RN). HMS Devonshire conducted speed trials on the measured mile. (4)
24 Mar 1945 HMS Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) conducted A/S exercises at/off Scapa Flow with HMS Carysfort (Lt.Cdr. L. St.G. Rich, DSO and Bar, RN). (3)
28 Mar 1945 HMS Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) conducted exercises at/off Scapa Flow. (3)
29 Mar 1945 HMS Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) conducted A/S exercises at/off Scapa Flow with HMS Petard (Lt.Cdr. R.L. Caple, DSC, RN). (3)
30 Mar 1945 HMS Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) conducted A/S exercises at/off Scapa Flow with HMS Petard (Lt.Cdr. R.L. Caple, DSC, RN). (3)
31 Mar 1945 HMS Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) conducted A/S exercises at/off Scapa Flow with local defence craft. (3)
1 Apr 1945 HMS Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) conducted A/S exercises at/off Scapa Flow with HMS Petard (Lt.Cdr. R.L. Caple, DSC, RN). (5)
3 Apr 1945 HMS Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) participated in A/S exercises at/off Scapa Flow. (5)
4 Apr 1945 HMS Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) participated in A/S exercises at/off Scapa Flow. (5)
7 Apr 1945 HMS Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) participated in A/S exercises at/off Scapa Flow. (5)
8 Apr 1945 HMS Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) departed Scapa Flow for Holy Loch. (5)
9 Apr 1945 HMS Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) arrived at Holy Loch. (5)
10 Apr 1945 HMS Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) conducted exercises in the Clyde area. (5)
12 Apr 1945 HMS Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) conducted noise trials in Loch Goil. (5)
14 Apr 1945 HMS Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) conducted attack exercises in the Clyde area during which HMS Hastings (A/Cdr. E.A. Stocker, DSC, RN) served as the target. (5)

15 Apr 1945 HMS Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) conducted attack exercises in the Clyde area during which HMS Hastings (A/Cdr. E.A. Stocker, DSC, RN) served as the target. These included night exercises. (5)
16 Apr 1945 HMS Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) returned to Holy Loch on completion of last night's exercises. (5)
17 Apr 1945 HMS Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) conducted attack exercises in the Clyde area during which HMS Hastings (A/Cdr. E.A. Stocker, DSC, RN) served as the target. (5)

18 Apr 1945 HMS Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) conducted night exercises in the Clyde area. Upon completion of these she returned to Holy Loch. She proceeded from Holy Loch to Arrochar later the same day. (5)
19 Apr 1945 HMS Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) conducted special torpedo trials off Arrochar. (5)
20 Apr 1945 HMS Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) conducted special torpedo trials off Arrochar. (5)
21 Apr 1945 HMS Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) conducted special torpedo trials off Arrochar. (5)
22 Apr 1945 HMS Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) conducted special torpedo trials off Arrochar. (5)
23 Apr 1945 HMS Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) conducted special torpedo trials off Arrochar. (5)
24 Apr 1945 HMS Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) conducted special torpedo trials off Arrochar. (5)
25 Apr 1945 HMS Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) conducted special torpedo trials off Arrochar. (5)
26 Apr 1945 HMS Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) conducted special torpedo trials off Arrochar. (5)
27 Apr 1945 HMS Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) conducted special torpedo trials off Arrochar. (5)
28 Apr 1945 HMS Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) conducted special torpedo trials off Arrochar. Upon completion of these HMS Vagabond proceeded to Holy Loch. (5)
15 May 1945 HMS Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) conducted noise trials in Loch Goil. (6)
19 May 1945 HMS Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) shifed from Holy Loch to Rothesay. (6)

20 May 1945 HMS Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) departed Rothesay to join the Dutch submarine HrMs O 23 (Lt.Cdr. A.J. Schouwenaar, RNN) for passage to Scapa Flow. Escort was provided by HMS Bridgewater (Cdr.(Retd.) R.H. Mack, RN). (6)
22 May 1945 HMS Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) arrived at Scapa Flow. (6)
23 May 1945 HMS Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) participated in A/S exercises at/off Scapa Flow. (6)
26 May 1945 HMS Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) conducted A/S exercises at/off Scapa Flow with HMS Widemouth Bay (A/Lt.Cdr. J.H. Macalister, RNVR). (6)
28 May 1945 HMS Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) participated in A/S exercises at/off Scapa Flow. (6)
29 May 1945 HMS Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) conducted A/S exercises at/off Scapa Flow with HMS Zebra (Lt.Cdr. E.C. Peake, RN). (6)
2 Jun 1945 HMS Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) participated in A/S exercises at/off Scapa Flow. (7)
4 Jun 1945 HMS Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) participated in A/S exercises at/off Scapa Flow. (7)
5 Jun 1945 HMS Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) departed Scapa Flow for Holy Loch. (7)
7 Jun 1945 HMS Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) arrived at Holy Loch. (7)
14 Jun 1945 HMS Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) conducted exercises in the Clyde area. (7)
15 Jun 1945 HMS Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) conducted exercises in the Clyde area. (7)
19 Jun 1945 HMS Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) conducted exercises in the Clyde area. (7)
20 Jun 1945 HMS Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) conducted exercises in the Clyde area. (7)
21 Jun 1945 HMS Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) conducted exercises in the Clyde area. (7)
22 Jun 1945 HMS Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) conducted exercises in the Clyde area. (7)
29 Jun 1945 HMS Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) conducted exercises in the Clyde area. (7)
30 Jun 1945 HMS Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) is docked at Holy Loch in AFD 7. (7)
1 Jul 1945 HMS Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) is undocked. (8)
5 Jul 1945 HMS Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) shifted from Holy Loch to Rothesay. (8)
12 Jul 1945 HMS Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) shifted from Rothesay to Campbeltown. Off Campbeltown A/S exercises with aircraft were carried out. These included night exercises. (8)
13 Jul 1945 HMS Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) proceeded to Campbeltown on completion of last night's exercises. (8)
15 Jul 1945 HMS Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) participated in A/S exercises off Campbeltown. (8)
16 Jul 1945 HMS Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) participated in A/S exercises off Campbeltown. (8)
18 Jul 1945 HMS Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) participated in A/S exercises off Campbeltown. (8)
19 Jul 1945 HMS Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) participated in A/S exercises off Campbeltown. (8)
20 Jul 1945 HMS Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) participated in A/S exercises off Campbeltown. (8)
21 Jul 1945 HMS Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) conducted SST trials off Campbeltown. (8)
24 Jul 1945 HMS Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) participated in A/S exercises off Campbeltown. (8)
26 Jul 1945 HMS Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) participated in A/S exercises off Campbeltown. (8)
29 Jul 1945 HMS Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) participated in A/S exercises off Campbeltown. (8)
30 Jul 1945 HMS Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) participated in A/S exercises off Campbeltown. (8)
31 Jul 1945 HMS Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) participated in A/S exercises off Campbeltown. (8)
1 Aug 1945 HMS Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) participated in A/S exercises off Campbeltown. (9)
5 Aug 1945 HMS Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) participated in A/S exercises off Campbeltown. (9)
6 Aug 1945 HMS Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) participated in A/S exercises off Campbeltown. (9)
7 Aug 1945 HMS Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) participated in A/S exercises off Campbeltown. (9)
8 Aug 1945 HMS Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) participated in A/S exercises off Campbeltown. (9)
10 Aug 1945 HMS Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) participated in A/S exercises off Campbeltown. (9)
12 Aug 1945 HMS Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) participated in A/S exercises off Campbeltown. (9)
13 Aug 1945 HMS Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) participated in A/S exercises off Campbeltown. (9)
14 Aug 1945 HMS Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) participated in A/S exercises off Campbeltown. (9)
17 Aug 1945 HMS Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) participated in A/S exercises off Campbeltown. (9)
21 Aug 1945 HMS Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) participated in A/S exercises off Campbeltown. (9)
23 Aug 1945 HMS Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) shifted from Campbeltown to Larne. (9)
28 Aug 1945 HMS Vagabond (Lt. I.M. Stoop, DSC, RN) shifted from Larne to Rothesay. (9)
ADM numbers indicate documents at the British National Archives at Kew, London.
